'''fadhapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumotoxin|pneumotoxin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumotoxin|pneumotoxin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fadhapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædhæpæth|fædhæpæth]] || [[word:fædhæpæj|fædhæpæj]] || [[word:fædhæpæsh|fædhæpæsh]] || [[word:fædhæpæ|fædhæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhadhapath|fadhadhapath]] || [[word:fadhadhapaj|fadhadhapaj]] || [[word:fadhadhapash|fadhadhapash]] || [[word:fadhadhapa|fadhadhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhapath|fadhapath]] || [[word:fadhapaj|fadhapaj]] || [[word:fadhapash|fadhapash]] || [[word:fadhapa|fadhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhafpath|fadhafpath]] || [[word:fadhafpaj|fadhafpaj]] || [[word:fadhafpash|fadhafpash]] || [[word:fadhafpaf|fadhafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fadhapatha|fadhapatha]] || [[word:fadhapaja|fadhapaja]] || [[word:fadhapasha|fadhapasha]] || [[word:fadhapaka|fadhapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fadhapath|fadhapath]] || [[word:fadhapaj|fadhapaj]] || [[word:fadhapash|fadhapash]] || [[word:fadhapa|fadhapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fadhapathal|fadhapathal]] || [[word:fadhapajal|fadhapajal]] || [[word:fadhapashal|fadhapashal]] || [[word:fadhapakal|fadhapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fadhapathatha|fadhapathatha]] || [[word:fadhapajaja|fadhapajaja]] || [[word:fadhapashasha|fadhapashasha]] || [[word:fadhapaka|fadhapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fadhapathan|fadhapathan]] || [[word:fadhapajan|fadhapajan]] || [[word:fadhapashan|fadhapashan]] || [[word:fadhapakan|fadhapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fadhapathaoro|fadhapathaoro]] || [[word:fadhapajaoro|fadhapajaoro]] || [[word:fadhapashaoro|fadhapashaoro]] || [[word:fadhapakaoro|fadhapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
